reviews.review_description: What looks like a great app (for free) became at last on an complex app without any real tutorial and any real support (last discord messages are dated on 2021). Adding files on the account make the app break down on the quest 2, simple as that. IF ONLY SOMEONE CARE A LITTLE ABOUT THIS APP, 'll be amazing, just some support, some interest in make a comunity! Very sad reallity for a great idea.
